title: schoenoplectus ehrenbergii
intro: Schoenoplectus ehrenbergii, also known as Ehrenberg's cordgrass or spike grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cattail family (Typhaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus ehrenbergii include its ability to help reduce swelling and improve respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. Schoenoplectus ehrenbergii can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to harness its potential health benefits.
